sections.title: Before starting Tree Gnome Village while outside the maze

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Hello, welcome to our maze. I'm Elkoy the tree gnome.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I haven't heard of your sort.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: There's not many of us left. Once you could find tree gnomes anywhere in the world, now we hide in small groups to avoid capture.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Capture by whom?

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Tree gnomes have been hunted for so called 'fun' since as long as I can remember.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Our main threat nowadays are General Khazard's troops. They know no mercy, but are also very dense. They'll never find their way through our maze.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Have fun.

sections.title: Before starting Tree Gnome Village while at the village

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Hello, welcome to our village. I'm Elkoy the tree gnome.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I haven't heard of your sort before.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: There's not many of us left. Once you could find tree gnomes anywhere in the world, now we hide in small groups to avoid capture.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Capture by whom?

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Tree gnomes have been hunted for so called 'fun' since as long as I can remember.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Our main threat nowadays are General Khazard's troops. They know no mercy, but are also very dense. They'll never find their way through our maze.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Have fun.

sections.title: After the completion of Tree Gnome Village while at the maze entrance

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Elkoy.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Hi there, I hope life is treating you well. Would you like me to show you the way to the village?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Here we are. Feel free to have a look around.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks Elkoy.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Ok then, take care.

sections.title: After the completion of Tree Gnome Village while inside the village

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello Elkoy.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Hi there, I hope life is treating you well. Would you like me to show you the way out of the village?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes please.

lines.speaker: Elkoy
lines.text: Here we are. Have a safe journey.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Not now, thanks.
